response: Hi there! 👋 I'm your AI support assistant. Ask me about orders, shipping, returns, payments, or anything else I can help with!
Standard delivery takes **3–5 business days**. Express shipping (1–2 days) is available at checkout. Shipping is free on orders over a set threshold — check the homepage for the current offer.
To track your order, please check the confirmation email you received after placing it — it contains a tracking link. If you can't find it, contact support with your order ID.
We offer a **30-day hassle-free return** policy. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Initiate a return from your account dashboard or contact support with your order ID.
We accept **Credit/Debit cards**, **Cash on Delivery (COD)**, and **EasyPaisa**. All online payments are secured with SSL encryption.
Orders can be cancelled within **1 hour** of placement. Go to your order history in your account, or contact support immediately with your order ID for faster processing.
Please refer to the **Size Guide** on the product page. If you're between sizes, we generally recommend sizing up for comfort. Feel free to ask about a specific product!
Check the homepage and sale section for current discounts. Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive promo codes. We also run seasonal sales — follow us on social media to stay updated!
All products shown on the site are currently in stock. If a product shows as unavailable, it's temporarily out of stock. You can sign up for restock notifications on the product page.

You can reach our support team via:
- 📧 **Email:** support@store.example
- 💬 **Live Chat:** Available Mon–Sat, 9 AM – 9 PM
- 📞 **Phone:** +92-XXX-XXXXXXX

We typically respond within 2–4 hours.
All our products come with a **6-month manufacturer warranty** covering defects. If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact support within 48 hours of delivery with photos.
You can create or log into your account using the user icon in the top navigation. To reset your password, click **'Forgot Password'** on the login page and we'll send you a reset link.
Currently, we only ship **within Pakistan**. International shipping is on our roadmap — subscribe to our newsletter to be notified when it launches!
Thank you for reaching out! 😊 If you have any more questions, don't hesitate to ask. Have a great day!
